---
name: Report an error
about: Flag a claimed error in a proof, computation, or citation
title: "[error] "
labels: ""
---

**Location**
<!-- File + section/line, e.g. data/DTAB-PAPER.md §6, or phases/phase42-T2-verdict.md. -->

**The claim as written**
<!-- Quote it. -->

**Why it's wrong**
<!-- Be specific and adversarial about the claim, not the author. A minimal counterexample or a pinpointed gap is ideal. -->

**Suggested correction**
<!-- Optional: what it should say, or what would need to be shown. -->
